feedback.text: Payment processors are currently in the process of taking the first steps towards mass censorship. They began by using their leverage to force several gaming sites to remove titles their personal beliefs didn't conform to under excuses of child protection. More recently they have also forced moderation in an esports event to silence complaints against them, using their position as a sponsor this time. This much power under a company should not exist, and it nothing is done about it it's sure to escalate even further.
